env.name: URL
env.label: URL
env.description: Top-level URL you have control over (e.g., customdomain.com if you own it, or customsubdomain.ddnsprovider.com if using dynamic DNS)

env.name: VALIDATION
env.label: VALIDATION
env.description: Certbot validation method to use. Options are http or dns (dns method also requires DNSPLUGIN variable set)

env.name: SUBDOMAINS
env.label: SUBDOMAINS
env.description: Subdomains to cover in the certificate (comma-separated, no spaces). For a wildcard cert, set this to 'wildcard' (available via dns validation only)

env.name: EXTRA_DOMAINS
env.label: EXTRA_DOMAINS
env.description: Additional fully qualified domain names (comma-separated, no spaces)

env.name: DNSPLUGIN
env.label: DNSPLUGIN
env.description: DNS plugin to use for dns validation (required if using dns validation method)

env.name: EMAIL
env.label: EMAIL
env.description: Optional email address used for cert expiration notifications (required for ZeroSSL)

env.name: CERTPROVIDER
env.label: CERTPROVIDER
env.description: Optionally define the cert provider. Set to zerossl for ZeroSSL certs (requires existing ZeroSSL account and the email address entered in EMAIL env var). Defaults to Let's Encrypt

env.name: PROPAGATION
env.label: PROPAGATION
env.description: Optionally define the propagation time for DNS validation. Defaults to 60 seconds

env.name: COLLECTIONS
env.label: COLLECTIONS
env.description: CrowdSec Collections. Defaults to crowdsecurity/nginx crowdsecurity/http-cve crowdsecurity/whitelist-good-actors LePresidente/authelia

description: SWAG (Secure Web Application Gateway), formerly known as letsencrypt, sets up an Nginx web server and reverse proxy with PHP support. It includes a built-in certbot client that automates free SSL server certificate generation and renewal processes (Let's Encrypt and ZeroSSL). This stack also contains CrowdSec for intrusion prevention and Authelia for Single Sign-On (SSO).
name: swag-crowdsec-authelia
title: SWAG, Authelia, and CrowdSec
